texto: Anyway, it's like when Kate Hudson was hooking up with that Jonas brother. It was kind of weird at first and then we all got used to it and nobody gave it a second thought. If anything, people applauded her because she's not afraid to go after what she wants. And she really wanted that cute little Jonas brother.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Winter Renshaw: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Anyway, it's like when Kate Hudson was hooking up with that Jonas brother. It was kind of weird a…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, age, age-difference pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de age-difference e jonas.

frase_original: Anyway, it's like when Kate Hudson was hooking up with that Jonas brother. It was kind of weird at first and then we all got used to it and nobody gave it a second thought. If anything, people applauded her because she's not afraid to go after what she wants. And she really wanted that cute little Jonas brother.
